output:
Aggregated execute batches: completed 5/5.
Batch 1: Executed batch 1 task `T1`. `useSelectedMediaClips` now carries `generationId` through for both image and video selections, `AgentTurn.attachments` now supports optional `prompt`, related frontend tests passed before and after the change, and progress was checkpointed to `.megaplan/plans/fix-verify-timeline-agent-20260404-0505/execution_batch_1.json`.
Batch 2: Executed batch 2 task `T2`. Added `prompt` to `SelectedClipPayload`, preserved incoming prompt metadata during normalization, added batched generation prompt enrichment in `selectedClips.ts`, wired the enriched clips into `runAgentLoop`, verified the selected-clips edge test module before and after the change, and checkpointed progress to `.megaplan/plans/fix-verify-timeline-agent-20260404-0505/execution_batch_2.json`.
Batch 3: Executed batch 3 tasks `T3` and `T4`. `loop.ts` now stores `generationId` and `prompt` on turn attachments, recovers selected clips from the most recent user turn when a continuation request arrives without `selectedClips`, and threads the recovered selection through the system prompt and tool-call path. `prompts.ts` now appends `prompt="..."` only when prompt metadata exists and adds concise multi-image guidance near the `create_task` examples. The existing `loop.test.ts` module passed before and after the edits, and progress was checkpointed to `.megaplan/plans/fix-verify-timeline-agent-20260404-0505/execution_batch_3.json`.
Batch 4: Executed batch 4 task `T5`. Added enrichment-path tests to `selectedClips.test.ts`, added attachment recovery and prompt rendering coverage to `loop.test.ts`, and reran the full four-file edge suite (`selectedClips.test.ts`, `tools/clips.test.ts`, `loop.test.ts`, `command-parser.test.ts`) before and after the edits. All four files passed after the new coverage landed, and progress was checkpointed to `.megaplan/plans/fix-verify-timeline-agent-20260404-0505/execution_batch_4.json`.
Batch 5: Executed batch 5 task `T6`. Re-ran the frontend verification modules (`AgentChat.test.tsx`, `useAgentSession.test.tsx`) and the full edge verification suite (`selectedClips.test.ts`, `tools/clips.test.ts`, `loop.test.ts`, `command-parser.test.ts`) with the current changes applied. All six modules passed. A disposable repro script also passed for the multi-image selected-clips payload path (normalize -> enrich prompts -> build attachment payload shape -> selected-clip prompt rendering), and the script was deleted immediately after the run. No regressions were found and no additional fixes were required.
commands_run: npx tsx --eval "import { buildSelectedClipsPrompt } from './supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/prompts.ts'; console.log(buildSelectedClipsPrompt([{ clip_id: 'clip-1', url: 'https://example.com/1.png', media_type: 'image', prompt: 'style reference\nwith line break' }], '- id=clip-1 track=V1')); console.log('---'); console.log(buildSelectedClipsPrompt([{ clip_id: 'clip-2', url: 'https://example.com/2.png', media_type: 'image' }], '- id=clip-2 track=V2'));"

task_updates.executor_notes: Verified `useSelectedMediaClips` now forwards `assetEntry.generationId` in both the image and video branches, and `AgentTurn.attachments` now accepts optional `prompt` alongside `generationId`. Baseline and post-change runs of `AgentChat.test.tsx` and `useAgentSession.test.tsx` both passed.

Verified the enrichment path uses a single batched `.in("id", generationIds)` query, returns early when no clips or no `generation_id` values are present, preserves prompt metadata on normalized clips, and extracts prompt text in the same priority order as `generationTransformers` (`originalParams.orchestrator_details.prompt`, then `params.prompt`, then `params.metadata.prompt`). `index.ts` now passes the enriched clips into `runAgentLoop`. The existing `selectedClips.test.ts` module passed before and after the change.

Verified `attachSelectedClips` now persists both `generationId` and `prompt` on attachments, `recoverSelectedClipsFromTurns` maps attachment camelCase fields back to `SelectedClipPayload` snake_case fields, and `runAgentLoop` falls back to recovered clips only when `selectedClips` is missing or empty. The existing `loop.test.ts` module passed before and after the loop changes.

Verified `buildSelectedClipsPrompt` only appends `| prompt="..."` when a non-empty prompt exists, and the system prompt now adds three multi-image guidance lines directly above the `create_task` examples. Prompt rendering verification was completed by code inspection because the sandbox blocked the direct `tsx` probe.

Verified the new tests cover enrichment happy path, no-`generation_id` passthrough, missing/null params, empty array early return, and prompt extraction priority order in `selectedClips.test.ts`, plus recovery from stored attachments and prompt text rendering in `loop.test.ts`. The full four-file edge suite passed after the edits: `selectedClips.test.ts`, `tools/clips.test.ts`, `loop.test.ts`, and `command-parser.test.ts`.

Verification passed without additional fixes. Frontend modules `AgentChat.test.tsx` and `useAgentSession.test.tsx` passed under the app Vitest config, edge modules `selectedClips.test.ts`, `tools/clips.test.ts`, `loop.test.ts`, and `command-parser.test.ts` passed under the edge Vitest config, and a disposable repro script confirmed the multi-image selected-clips path carries prompt metadata into attachment payload shape and selected-clip prompt rendering.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed the image branch at lines 46-53 and video branch at lines 56-63 both populate `generationId: assetEntry.generationId`, and `AgentTurn.attachments` now includes optional `prompt?: string` next to `generationId?: string`.

Confirmed `enrichClipsWithPrompts` does one `generations` batch lookup via `.in("id", generationIds)`, returns immediately when there are no generation ids to enrich, uses `originalParams.orchestrator_details.prompt -> params.prompt -> params.metadata.prompt`, and `index.ts` passes `enrichedSelectedClips` rather than the raw normalized array into `runAgentLoop`.

Confirmed `attachSelectedClips` writes `generationId` and `prompt`, `recoverSelectedClipsFromTurns` converts `clipId/url/mediaType/generationId/prompt` back into `clip_id/url/media_type/generation_id/prompt`, and `runAgentLoop` only uses recovered clips when `selectedClips?.length` is falsy.

Confirmed `buildSelectedClipsPrompt` builds `promptText` only when `clip.prompt` is a non-empty string, so it cannot emit `prompt=undefined`, and the system prompt additions are three lines placed immediately under the `create_task` instruction header.

Confirmed all four target files passed after the test additions (`selectedClips.test.ts`, `tools/clips.test.ts`, `loop.test.ts`, `command-parser.test.ts`), and the new coverage now exercises enrichment success, passthrough without generation ids, null params, empty arrays, attachment recovery, and prompt text rendering.

Yes. The frontend verification modules and the full four-file edge suite all passed with the current changes applied, the disposable multi-image payload repro script passed, and no regressions were found that required follow-up fixes.
